products.name: Dolce Gusto
pros: Recommended by Altroconsumo as one of the best coffee capsules
Wide range of flavors and compatible with many machines
Competitive price range (up to €0.25 per capsule)

products.name: Nespresso
pros: Top pick in Altroconsumo’s capsule test
High quality espresso with consistent taste
Available in a variety of blends and price points

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo’s 2025 test lists Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as top recommendations, providing fresh evidence.
videoSource: Migliori Capsule Caffè : marche e prezzi
